title: JaredH4's Weeping angels
body:
I Added Weeping Angels to Minecraft!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/U9WEFeEtxE0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Commands:
```
Summon Angel Below You: /function angels:summon
Give Spawn Egg: /function angels:give/spawn_egg
Kill Angels Within 10 Blocks: /function angels:kill_angel
Kill All Angels: /function angels:kill_all_angels
Give Admin Tag to Self (Prevents Teleporting): /tag @s add admin
```

Hope You Enjoy This Pack!
